text:
IMPARTIAL NEWS + INTELLIGENT DEBATE

Account

The opening ceremony of the 2024Paris Olympicswill take place later this evening as the French capital becomes the first city to hold the Summer games for the third time.

Celine Dion and Lady Gaga – the former’s first performance since being diagnosed with Stiff Person Syndrome (SPS) – are to perform on the River Seine to formally begin this year’s Games.

The opening ceremony overall will last up to almost four hours with the floating parade travelling down the river past the French capital’s most famous landmarks.

Prior to theopening of the ceremony attacks on the travel networksparked severe delays with some 800,000 passengers impacted as high-speed rail line SNCF asked travellers to “postpone their trip and not go to the station”.

Followi‘s liveblog for the latest updates.

This blog has now closed, thank you.

Impartial news + intelligent debate

title: World awaits formal opening of the 2024 Olympic Games
author: Euan O'Byrne Mulligan
description: As many as 45,000 police and security officials have been drafted in for the ceremony
